reviews.comment:
La estación bien. Despacho correcto. Baños d hombres 7 pst sobre 10 baños de mujeres 3 sobre 10 sucios. Muy sucios increible q sea así. No es culpa del q limpia.

(Translated by Google)
The station was fine. The service was good. Men's restrooms were 7 out of 10, women's restrooms were 3 out of 10 and dirty. It's unbelievable how dirty it is. It's not the cleaning staff's fault.
